404.subtitle: Oops! Page Not Found
404.description: Looks like this page took a vacation without telling us!
404.quote: I swear it was here just a moment ago...

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.subtitle: We are under maintenance

maintenance.quote: Don't worry, we'll be back soon!

home.title: Team Resource Management
home.subtitle: Optimize your team's resource usage. Book rooms and tools easily and efficiently.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Discover how TeamResources can improve your team's efficiency

tools.title: Tool Management
tools.description: Monitor the usage and availability of company tools

pricing.title: Affordable Pricing for Every Team
pricing.subtitle: Optimize your resources without emptying your wallet. With TeamResources, efficiency is just a click and a budget away.

pricing.title: Simple and Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your needs and budget

free.description: For teams that want to try the service
free.features: Max 1 room, Max 10 tools, Max 20 users

basic.description: For teams that need a helping hand to get started
basic.features: Max 10 rooms, Max 100 tools, Max 40 users

premium.description: For teams that want maximum control
premium.features: Max 100 rooms, Max 1000 tools, Max 100 users

sign-in.title: Welcome Back
sign-in.description: Sign in to your account to continue
sign-in.accountDescription: Sign in with email and password
sign-in.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email to reset your password
sign-in.forgotPasswordEmailSent: We have sent an email with instructions to reset your password. Check your inbox.
sign-in.tokenNotFound: Token not found. Please check your email for the reset link.
sign-in.passwordChangedDescription: You can now sign in to your account with your new password.
sign-in.magicLinkCheckEmailDescription: We have sent a magic link to the email address you provided. Click the link to access your account.
sign-in.magicLinkErrorDescription: The magic link is either invalid or expired. Please try signing in again.

sign-out.title: Signed Out
sign-out.description: You have been successfully signed out. See you soon!

sign-up.title: Create an Account
sign-up.description: Create an account by filling out the fields below
sign-up.verifyEmailDescription: We have sent a verification link to the email address you provided. Check your inbox and confirm your account.
sign-up.emailVerifiedDescription: Your email has been successfully verified. You can now sign in to your account.

success.title: Payment Completed
success.description: Your payment has been successfully completed. Thank you for choosing TeamResources!

cancel.title: Payment Canceled
cancel.description: Your payment has been canceled. If you need assistance, please contact us.

codes.rateLimit: Request limit exceeded for IP. Please try again later.
codes.sendingEmail: Error sending email. Please try again later.
codes.notAuthenticated: You must be authenticated to access this resource.
codes.emailAlreadyInUse: Unable to create user with these credentials
codes.invalidTokenAndResend: Invalid or expired token. We have sent you an email with a new link.
codes.invalidCredentials: Email/password not valid or not verified (check your email)
